judge_reason: Description A describes a handwritten letter with an ink blot, while Description B describes a stamped label with specific text; they are clearly about different visual content.
original_image_tags: Handwritten letter on aged, off-white paper. The handwriting is in blue ink. There is a dark, irregular ink blot at the bottom center of the page. The paper shows signs of aging and slight discoloration. The top right corner has a faint, handwritten annotation that appears to be a file number or date.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned handwritten letter on plain paper with blue ink, including an FBI receipt stamp reading “RECEIVED FBI” and “MR. JONES,” handwritten date and address lines, and a postscript beginning “P.S.” near the middle of the page.*
